description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker with a canvas upper featuring a patchwork of colors: red on the toe box and midsection, blue around the collar and eyelets, green at the heel, and a yellow tongue. The shoe has a classic lace-up design with visible eyelets and a white rubber sole that shows signs of wear and dirt, giving it a slightly aged appearance. The midsole is off-white and textured, with a subtle foxing stripe running along its edge. The interior lining appears to be blue, matching the exterior collar, and the heel counter is reinforced for added support. The overall silhouette is rounded at the toe and heel, with a flat sole suitable for urban walking. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A colorful, low-top canvas sneaker with a red, blue, green, and yellow patchwork design and a worn white rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red toe and midsection, blue collar and eyelets, green heel, and yellow tongue, with the worn white sole clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded red toe, blue eyelets, and yellow tongue, with the laces and sole wear most prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the same color distribution and worn sole, with the blue collar and green heel visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the green heel counter, blue collar, and the back of the worn white sole.
